name: Vegetable Rice Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Cremini or Button Mushrooms, sliced
2 Green Onions (white and green parts), chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the water to a rolling boil.
2. Wash and drain the rice; stir into the boiling water.
3. Reduce heat to low and cook for 15 minutes.
4. While the rice is hot, add peas, watercress, mushrooms, green onions, and carrot slices for a couple of minutes. The heat of the rice will wilt the vegetables.
5. Add the vinaigrette and toss gently.
6. Serve warm or at room temperature.
Serves 6
Nutrition Info per serving: 160 calories, 40g fat, No Cholesterol, 220mg sodium.
